title: 喜ぶ顔を思い浮かべて

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Do people often come to open-air cafes like this?
I'm afraid I don't eat out much unless someone's
invited me.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I usually eat at the cafeteria because I'm so busy.
The food isn't bad, actually.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Still, what an awful lot of students here. This must
be a trendy spot.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... The menu has nutritional options
specifically for Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... "Extra-Large Stamina-Building Honey
Milk"... "Umastagram-Worthy Jelly Soda"?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Is that right? I strictly monitor the caloric intake
of my runners, but...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Just one should be fine. Let's have a look at the
menu.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
This may lead to a good opportunity to boost
team morale.
choice_data_list: I'm sure they'll love whatever you get them.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Yes... but we must be mindful not to let them
become complacent.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We enjoy some drinks as we chat away about our
runners.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense. So sometimes what burdens
them more isn't pressure from their peers, but
rather—

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's time to go. We have a meeting in the
afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I just need to order some drinks to go... Which do
you think is better?
choice_data_list: Go for the Extra-Large Honey Milk!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
The honey milk? Little Cocon and Bitter Glasse
should almost be done with the training regimen I
set out, so that would be perfect.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I'm sure Bitter Glasse will be particularly
thrilled to get such a giant drink.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You should see her eyes light up with competitive
fire whenever she catches sight of absurdly
oversized things.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I wouldn't be surprised if she tried to drink the
entire thing in one go. I'll have to keep an eye on
her...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for inviting me out today,
<username>.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I... I've got some nice gifts now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems to have trouble carrying the enormous
drinks by herself, so I give her a hand as we return
to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Yes, it's so visually pleasing, it might do
well to lift their mood.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, we get to choose the color of the jelly? Little
Cocon would like... something dark, I'd imagine.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Her taste in things can be a bit unconventional,
and she's picky about how things look.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I don't keep up with the newest trends, so this is
not my forte...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Could you help me pick something?

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate it. Let me buy something for your
trainee as thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We take our time selecting the jelly colors for the
drinks to make them as aesthetically pleasing as
possible.
